texto: I've gone to prom multiple times, had fights with the principal, a relationship with my teacher. When people ask if I wish I had gone to high school, I tell them that I've acted all of that stuff out, and it just doesn't seem like fun.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Britt Robertson: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de passagem do tempo e prioridades. O trecho “I've gone to prom multiple times, had fights with the principal, a relationship with my teacher. …” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que educacao, relationship, school pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de school e fun.

frase_original: I've gone to prom multiple times, had fights with the principal, a relationship with my teacher. When people ask if I wish I had gone to high school, I tell them that I've acted all of that stuff out, and it just doesn't seem like fun.
